message: ci: use setup-swift v3 on Linux

files.patch:
@@ -55,8 +55,14 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
+      - name: Runner info
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          uname -a
+          uname -m
+
       - name: Setup Swift 6.2.1
-        uses: swift-actions/setup-swift@v2
+        uses: swift-actions/setup-swift@v3
         with:
           swift-version: "6.2.1"

@@ -22,8 +22,14 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
+      - name: Runner info
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          uname -a
+          uname -m
+
       - name: Setup Swift 6.2.1
-        uses: swift-actions/setup-swift@v2
+        uses: swift-actions/setup-swift@v3
         with:
           swift-version: "6.2.1"
